mapper.select: SELECT tm AS weather_tm, wd AS weather_wd, ws AS weather_ws, ta AS weather_ta, hm AS weather_hm, rn AS weather_rn FROM storage.weather ORDER BY tm DESC LIMIT 1

choose.when: SELECT TRIM(incident_line_name) AS line_name, TO_CHAR(create_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS event_date, COUNT(*) AS count FROM storage.incident WHERE create_at >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days' GROUP BY TRIM(incident_line_name), TO_CHAR(create_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY event_date ASC
choose.otherwise: SELECT TRIM(I.incident_line_name) AS line_name, TO_CHAR(I.create_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS event_date, COUNT(*) AS total_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN TRIM(I.incident_station_id) LIKE '%' || (SELECT station_name FROM storage.local WHERE station_id = #{station_id} LIMIT 1) || '%' OR TRIM(I.incident_station_id) = #{station_id} THEN 1 END) AS count FROM storage.incident I WHERE TO_CHAR(I.create_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') >= TO_CHAR(CURRENT_DATE - 6, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AND TRIM(I.incident_line_name) = ( SELECT line_name FROM storage.local WHERE station_id = #{station_id} LIMIT 1 ) GROUP BY TRIM(I.incident_line_name), TO_CHAR(I.create_at, 'YYYY-MM-DD') ORDER BY event_date ASC
